commands.name: add
commands.description: Add include or exclude filter rules

commands.name: exclude
commands.description: Add an exclude filter rule

commands.name: include
commands.description: Add an include filter rule

commands.name: analyze-diff
commands.description: Compare two NDJSON profiling outputs

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: callers
commands.description: Show which methods call a specific method

options.name: --method
options.description: Method name or pattern to match

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: calltree
commands.description: Show the call tree for a specific method invocation

options.name: --method
options.description: Method name or pattern to match

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: check
commands.description: CI regression gate: compare traces, exit non-zero on regression

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Delete profiling session(s)

commands.name: clear-filters
commands.description: Clear all filter rules from a session

options.name: --type
options.description: Filter type to clear: 'include' or 'exclude' (omit to clear both)

commands.name: exceptions
commands.description: Rank exception types by frequency with throw-site methods

options.name: --top
options.description: Number of exception types to show [default: 20]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: export
commands.description: Convert traces to external formats (speedscope, csv)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (default: auto-generated based on format)

commands.name: flush
commands.description: Trigger manual stats flush on a running profiled process

options.name: --pid
options.description: PID of the profiled process to flush

commands.name: generate-env
commands.description: Generate environment variable script for profiling

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: batch, powershell, or shell [default: shell]

options.name: --force
options.description: Generate script even if profiler DLL is not found

commands.name: hotspots
commands.description: Show per-method timing hotspots with self time

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort by: self, inclusive, calls, or allocs [default: self]

options.name: --filter
options.description: Include only methods matching pattern(s) (method, class, or namespace)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new profiling session

options.name: --scenario
options.description: Optional scenario name for this profiling session

commands.name: list
commands.description: List existing profiling sessions

commands.name: memory
commands.description: Show GC summary and allocation hotspots by class

options.name: --top
options.description: Number of allocation types to show [default: 20]

options.name: --filter
options.description: Include only class names matching pattern(s)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Combine multiple trace files into one sorted by timestamp

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove include or exclude filter rules

commands.name: exclude
commands.description: Remove an exclude filter rule

commands.name: include
commands.description: Remove an include filter rule

commands.name: report
commands.description: Report an issue to the GitHub repository

commands.name: run
commands.description: Launch an executable with profiler environment variables attached

options.name: --detach
options.description: Launch and return immediately (for GUI/long-running apps)

arguments.name: EXE_PATH
arguments.description: Path to the executable to profile

arguments.name: EXTRA_ARGS
arguments.description: Additional arguments passed to the executable

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set session configuration values

commands.name: compute-deltas
commands.description: Enable or disable delta timing

commands.name: events
commands.description: Set enabled event types

arguments.name: EVENTS
arguments.description: Event types to enable (e.g. enter leave method_stats)

commands.name: max-events
commands.description: Set maximum event count

commands.name: metadata
commands.description: Set metadata values

commands.name: output
commands.description: Set output path

commands.name: stats-flush-interval
commands.description: Set periodic stats flush interval

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Show trace overview: events, threads, methods, duration

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: threads
commands.description: Per-thread breakdown: call counts, timing, activity windows

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort by: calls or time [default: calls]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: timeline
commands.description: Chronological event listing with filtering

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

commands.name: trend
commands.description: Method performance trend across periodic stats flushes

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]
